LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandNomad1.title: Wasteland Nomad
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandNomad1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to believe that standing in one place was wrong. [PAWN_pronoun] traveled around, finding kibble for [PAWN_possessive] animals until they got infected with scaria and attacked [PAWN_objective].
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandDrifter2.title: Wasteland Drifter
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandDrifter2.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was a member of a pirate gang and used to ride vehicles to the raids before [PAWN_possessive] crew got struck by an anomaly and [PAWN_possessive] vehicle exploded, leaving nothing but scrap. [PAWN_pronoun] still yearns for some driving.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_TheChosenOne1.title: The Chosen One
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_TheChosenOne1.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived inside an underground colony not so long ago, before it was raided by insectoids and fleshbeasts. Now [PAWN_pronoun] looks forward to getting revenge on those creatures who emerged from the underground.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandScavenger3.title: Bunker Scavenger
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandScavenger3.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to scavenge old, abandoned bunkers after the apocalypse. [PAWN_pronoun] went crazy silent after [PAWN_pronoun] saw what was left from [PAWN_possessive] ancestors.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandVaulter4.title: Vaulter
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandVaulter4.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived off an underground bunker owned by the government. The Bunker’s citizens became dumb. Living many years underground and distancing themselves from humanity. [PAWN_pronoun] broke that cycle, leaving [PAWN_possessive] vault behind. [PAWN_pronoun] might be the only one seeing the sun on their bloodline.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandCook5.title: Wasteland Cook
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandCook5.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to butcher and cook toxic animals near the polluted lands for [PAWN_possessive] camp as they had no food sources. [PAWN_pronoun] met [PAWN_possessive] demise after staying malnourished for many weeks. [PAWN_pronoun] had no choice but to eat [PAWN_possessive] own colleagues.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandArtist6.title: Wasteland Artist
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandArtist6.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves to make art in any possible way, from tattoos to graffiti, it's [PAWN_possessive] whole lifestyle! But due to the mechanoids' vast-technology ever expanding to make everything automated, [PAWN_pronoun] hates them so much as they lower the price of the artists.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandForager7.title: Wasteland Forager
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandForager7.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to gather berries and other useful stuff from the local forest before [PAWN_possessive] colony died from food poisoning. [PAWN_pronoun] was tough enough to survive that.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandProstitute8.title: Wasteland Prostitute
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandProstitute8.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used various methods to earn money, working as a Prostitute after the apocalypse. [PAWN_pronoun] sometimes didn't get paid, and things escalated into violence. Wasteland taught [PAWN_objective] a deep lesson.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandSurvivor9.title: Cult Survivor
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandSurvivor9.description: [PAWN_nameDef] joined a cult after the apocalypse. [PAWN_pronoun] believed in their ways before being put as a sacrilegious offering on an altar and condemned to execution. [PAWN_pronoun] managed to escape through it at the cost of [PAWN_possessive] sanity.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandFighter10.title: Wasteland Fighter
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandFighter10.description: [PAWN_nameDef] murdered countless people for the safety of [PAWN_possessive] colony. [PAWN_pronoun] Fought everyone on a last stand before they left [PAWN_objective] crumpled up. [PAWN_pronoun] is a wall that you can trust in any way.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandSettler11.title: Wasteland Settler
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandSettler11.description: [PAWN_nameDef] wants to form the most secure outpost ever. [PAWN_possessive] other attempts failed, either raided by pirates or mechanoids. [PAWN_pronoun] will pursue [PAWN_possessive] dreams no matter what.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandHazmat12.title: Wasteland Hazmat
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandHazmat12.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to carry a mechanicator's wastepacks all over the rim. The toxic waste did not affect [PAWN_objective] that badly; [PAWN_pronoun] is looking forward to your labor with the Intelligence [PAWN_pronoun] gained working with the Mechanicator.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandPostGuard13.title: Post Guard
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandPostGuard13.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a colony's Checkpoint Guard. [PAWN_pronoun] stood all day there watching shamblers and doing nothing. But still worked like a charm when the threats showed up.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandBounty14.title: Wanted Colonist
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandBounty14.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is wanted by the pirates because [PAWN_pronoun] couldn’t bear their cruelty anymore, and one night [PAWN_pronoun] released the shamblers that were locked in the camp's basement. [PAWN_pronoun]'s still on the run; some time has passed since [PAWN_possessive] escape.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandReporter15.title: City Reporter
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandReporter15.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked as a reporter in a destroyed city. [PAWN_pronoun] usually made [PAWN_possessive] money off of making scenes and blaming it on the mutants. [PAWN_pronoun] obeys the rule of money.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandHunter16.title: Wasteland Hunter
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandHunter16.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived on the edge of the rim, growing [PAWN_possessive] own crops and breeding [PAWN_possessive] animals. [PAWN_pronoun] lived a pretty chill life before the whole forest succumbed to the ever-growing pollution.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandFighter17.title: Retribution Fighter
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandFighter17.description: [PAWN_nameDef] believes in god's retribution. As those who commit wrong acts shall be inflicted with a punishment. [PAWN_pronoun] trained in that manner, saving people from the wrong's hands and murdering people who did evil. [PAWN_pronoun] also loves baking cookies after slaying [PAWN_possessive] enemies.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandRat18.title: Wasteland Rat
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandRat18.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to scavenge outposts for people's belongings, [PAWN_pronoun] decorated [PAWN_possessive] own home with the stolen goods. Until [PAWN_pronoun] tried stealing from an empire base, which ended poorly as they captured [PAWN_objective] and threw [PAWN_objective] to the edge of the rim with a capsule full of toxic wastepack.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandScrapper19.title: Scrapper
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandScrapper19.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used materials such as components and corroded metals to make [PAWN_objective]self some sort of protective gear against the threats of the outer world, such as shamblers, insectoids, and even mechanoids. [PAWN_pronoun] still loves [PAWN_possessive] job.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandBandit20.title: Caravan Bandit
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandBandit20.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to assault several trade caravans with [PAWN_possessive] own group. They were pretty successful with it until one night, when [PAWN_pronoun] mistook a horde of shamblers for a caravan heading to a nearby settlement. [PAWN_pronoun]r entire group was brutally murdered and eaten alive. Leaving [PAWN_possessive] stranded in this cold, dark world.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandBuilder21.title: City Builder
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandBuilder21.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived in a destroyed city, where [PAWN_pronoun] would go around fixing people's buildings and barricades after they were attacked by eldritch creatures. [PAWN_pronoun] didn't ask for any money but for a stay there. [PAWN_pronoun] did meet great people by doing this, until [PAWN_pronoun] met disgusting people. They did unspeakable acts. Causing [PAWN_objective] to stop [PAWN_possessive] cause.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandScientist22.title: Plague Bringer
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandScientist22.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked on a world-wide project on [PAWN_possessive] home planet that could save them from famine. [PAWN_pronoun] worked there as one of the scientists behind this project. The project ended up as a catastrophe, and the food created by the artifical machines came with the plague that wiped off everyone on [PAWN_possessive] planet. [PAWN_pronoun] boarded the only ship, leaving others to die.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandCaretaker23.title: Wasteland Caretaker
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandCaretaker23.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to help sick people in need after the apocalypse, spending from [PAWN_possessive] own for medicine and even stealing from others.[PAWN_pronoun]'s the kindest person you might ever see.
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandLeech24.title: Wasteland Leech
LanguageData.UB_Apoc_WastelandLeech24.description: [PAWN_nameDef] used to be a leech, acting as a private worker for some pirates during the apocalypse. [PAWN_pronoun] did all kinds of work that they wanted, not even caring about their gender. When some time passed, [PAWN_pronoun] betrayed them. Making them pay for all the stuff they did to [PAWN_objective].
